testcase.name: Login Test Suite › TC01 - Valid Login

error.message: Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded while running "beforeEach" hook.

testcase.error:
[chromium] › login.test.js:31:3 › Login Test Suite › TC01 - Valid Login ──────────────────────────
Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded while running "beforeEach" hook.

at ..\pageObject\loginpage.js:20
